beats.text: A minivan glides past the curb like it's looking for something to hit. It stops. A weed-green tracksuit emerges into the afternoon sun.

beats.speaker: RayRay
beats.text: DAVID! MY BOY! I BROUGHT BEER AND I BROUGHT PRINCESS!
Princess, a pit bull with kind eyes and a pink collar, wags so hard her whole back half moves.

end_a.text: Karen does not speak. Karen does not need to speak. Karen is a weather system now.

end_b.text: RayRay's grin collapses in slow motion. Princess whimpers. Somewhere inside Dad, a small organ fails.
